_README: This file is .claude/settings.json — committed to the repo, shared with the whole team.
Put personal overrides and secrets in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored — never commit that file).
Customize the formatter command in the PostToolUse hook below to match your project's format script.
The permissions.deny list hard-blocks reads and writes to secrets and production config.
permissions.ask entries will prompt before executing potentially destructive git operations.
To disable a hook temporarily for one session, use settings.local.json to override it — do not edit this file.

PostToolUse._description: Run the project formatter after any file edit or write. Customize the command below.

_examples_not_active._description: Example: run targeted tests after editing a source file. Copy into PostToolUse and customize.
Example: run lint after any write. Swap in your linter command.
